entry.title: Re: Dicas de Implementação - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, inbound invoicing option for Bra
entry.content:
Obrigada pela dicas, Claudia!

Alguém saberia informar onde buscamos o Ultimo NSU para configurarmos tcode EDOC_BR_MNG_DISTDFE?

entry.title: Re: BTE or substitution does not work druing FB70 simulation
entry.content: 1399674 - ENJOY/FB01: No substitution for event 3 during simulation

entry.title: Can I add custom tab into WBS Element for transaction CJ91/CJ92 in S4 Hana?
entry.content:
Please suggest, how to add custom tab into WBS Element for transaction CJ91/CJ92 in SAP S/4HANA 2023?

or let me know if it is feasible in SAP S/4HANA 2023?

as per my knowledge Fiori approach, the recommended and upgrade-safe method to add a custom tab or fields to the WBS Element (CJ93 equivalent) is through In-App

Extensibility using the "Custom Fields and Logic "Fiori app.

For GUI Screen, Classical enhancement like CNEX007 is still required.

and in the Enhancement CNEX007. FM - EXIT_SAPLCJWB_001 is not available in the S/4HANA 2023.

I have attached the screen short and marked with yellow box where need to add custom tab with custom fields. Please suggest the solution. 

Thanks,

Priyanka Soni

entry.title: Re: Configuration: SAP Business Network SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authenticati
entry.content: thanks @Milen33 , I was under the impression that the sp= param in the URL we maintain on our side had to match precisely the application name given in IAS. Good to know it works with passing the remoteLogin url in the sp= parameter and that solves this issue with the buyer url sent in notifications.

entry.title: Re: The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at...
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for your response!

Regarding the resource path: I'm actually using / in the "Path" field to list and explore all available services. When I try to test a specific service using the full path like /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OData_Service_Name>, I still get the same error:

"The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at the destination."

I’ve double-checked the Cloud Connector mapping and the backend system, and everything seems to be in place.

Any idea what else could be causing this issue?

Thanks again for your support!

entry.title: Re: US Form I-9 Concepts for SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0
entry.content: @BerlindaMensah For rehires do they still need to complete I9s within the 3 years if it's still valid.

entry.title: asset 'year-end' value is not equal to the next year ‘Fiscal year start ’value
entry.content: Dear Expects, We found: The Asset of ‘year-end value’ is not equal to the next year ‘Fiscal year start ’value. Asset 1032056154 2024 year-end value is 3,606,942.53, please see the under picture . But the same asset 2025 Fiscal year start is 4,358,626.56,so the asset 2024 Year-end value is not equal 2025 Fiscal year start , how to solve to the problem ,thanks! In addition we want to know how to check other asset , and avoid the same problem. Supp: We had been executed（AJAB） Year-End Closing successfully thanks! Jordan

entry.title: Re: DataSphere Malfunction: Blank Page in Preview Model
entry.content: Hey there :). Where is your hierarchy? Econimica Dimension? Can you post a screen shot from there/the hierarchy? Also FACT1 and FACT2 seem identical, or do I miss something? Also please post a screen shot of the model dimensions (not the model-view).

entry.title: Re: Delta extraction is not working in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Hey there, how do you fetch the data? replication flow listening? ODQ? CDS delta is supported and working properly.

entry.title: Re: Footer must be bottom of every page in reward statement
entry.content:
Hi @SF_Abhisek 

I checked with our custom reporting expert and it's not possible.

"not possible. Unless the pages are fixed. pdf outputs don't acknowledge the footer tags. they're using a br tags which works but won't work in all scenarios if the page is dynamic."

 

All the best,
Xavier

 

@SF_Abhisek

entry.title: UI.DataFieldForIntentBasedNavigation does not navigate to selected Sales Document
entry.content:
I am using the below annotation in a UI.LineItem annotation (i.e., a table). The annotation below is creating a button, that when clicked, navigates to the app with the semantic object of SalesContract with the action of change, which is the Change Contract - VA42 app. The RequiresContext allows me to select a row before navigating to it, which should select the SalesDocument I wish to navigate to, however, whenever I click on a row, and then hit the "Change Contract" button created by this annotation, it always navigates to one specific SalesDocument, regardless of which row I selected. Does anyone know how I would fix this issue?

<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForIntentBasedNavigation">
    <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Change Contract"/>
    <PropertyValue Property="SemanticObject" String="SalesContract"/>
    <PropertyValue Property="Action" String="change"/>
    <PropertyValue Property="RequiresContext" Bool="true"/>
</Record>

entry.title: Re: Which table stores the flexible workflow steps information
entry.content: See the table to have all step of Wkflw in table SWDSMNODES with MOMDELEMENT = S (as Step) with WFDI_ID = Workflow ID

entry.title: Re: Can i connect to two different sap s4 hana public clo...
entry.content: Hey there, the connection name is S/4, or BW, or ... this is a defined name in the wizard and cannot be changed. You can change the underlying connection parameters however. So switch from one to another, but not both I fear.

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge - SAP Community Escape House - UI5
entry.content: I escaped from room UI5.

entry.title: Re: CDS for Fiori My Inbox Generic Application
entry.content: can you please explain the solution. I am stuck at the same problem.

entry.title: Re: due date for credit memos FKK_CREATE_DOC
entry.content: Credit terms are applied for any credit posting.  They are mapped to your FICA payment term and applied at creation.

entry.title: Re: Custom Tasks in Onboarding and Offboarding
entry.content:
Hi 

Thanks for this detailed custom task KBA .

Anyone can help if Is it possible if you can add read only document under custom task under for you today for new hire

entry.title: Re: How can we highlight New or Featured trainings more p...
entry.content:
Hi @Sang1 

As per the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3511497/E , the Featured tile is not present at the New Learning Experience homepage.

But it's possible to use a filter through the Enhanced Search to find the Featured, New, and Revised items.

More details in the below links:

  • https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-learning/managing-sap-successfactors-learning-for-administrators/placing-courses-into-featured-new-and-revised-card-categories
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-q-a/feature-tile/qaq-p/12699791

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Document Currency in VF01- Modifiable
entry.content:
Hello everyone. We had the same issue. Since we are using standard intercompany there is no sales document that we can update with the currency. We added code to the copy control routine so that the VBRK-WAERK was updated with the currency in the intercompany purchasing agreement.

Hope this helps.

Regards,

Edson

entry.title: SAP ASE 16 certification on Oracle Cloud
entry.content:
Good day

Is there any certification for SAP ASE 16.0/16.1 on Oracle Cloud(OCI) , assuming it'll run on Oracle Red Hat Linux (8.x,9.x) ?

Thank you

Regards

Jose

entry.title: Re: When will prices for SQL Anywhere on the SAP Online Store be fixed?
entry.content: OK - I have refined the problem. Indeed prices are correct in US Currency. However, when Canadian Dollars are selected in CleverBridge checkout, which was my default, all offerings are priced at $495 CAD. Do you see this as well?

entry.title: Re: Get records based on a another table that has a range (ABAP CDS)
entry.content: Probably late to the party, but we just did this logic in AMDP table function.

entry.title: Time sheet accounts - "Added by the current time sheet" value is not correct
entry.content:
Hi @Volker_Ruof  & colleagues, 

We have set up a time evaluation that we use for calculating working hours and the creation of overhours and overtime. It also includes paid absences. We have now figoured out that the time evaluation works correctly in the background, and the flexitime account is correctly credited or debited. This is the case regardless of whether half-day or full-day absences are recorded. However, what is not correct is the value displayed in the lower part of the time tracking sheet.

This is in the "Time Sheet Accounts section" under "Added by the current time sheet" – this value calculates the absences incorrectly and adds them back to the balance.

Is this a known issue and are there any suggestions on how this could be corrected?

#timetracking #successfactors #flexitime

entry.title: Re: Extract Properties in SAP Commerce
entry.content:
Hi @prashantkumar_bhatt 

Thanks for the post and helpful script!

Will this also extract localization properties for the type system as well?

entry.title: Re: ABAP BTP Cloud, Download files from ABAP program to local PC
entry.content:
This is a very interesting solution to SAP restrictions related to downloading files.

Thanks for sharing it

entry.title: Re: TAX CODE
entry.content:
Hi Harilal,

General speaking, YES, the requestor can add the tax code in purchase requisition.

After the PR is fully approved, the tax code will be brought to purchase order generated by Ariba automatically.

Best regards,

Sirui

entry.title: Time Tracking - Correction of a clock-in time
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I have a question regarding the configuration of Clocking In/Clocking Out.

An employee forgot to clock back in after the lunch break. She would like to correct this now and register her clock-in time at 12:30 PM. However, the system does not allow this—she only has the option to register a "Clock Out" time. The "Clock In" time can only be recorded after one hour (since the last "Clock Out").

Is anyone familiar with this behavior and knows where this setting can be adjusted? Or is this the default setting of the system, and it cannot be changed?

entry.title: SAC Planning Layout related
entry.content:
I have a SAC Planning reporting requirement. The excel layout used by the user is as attached in the screenshot below. 

It has different sections.

The first section (MRR), has entries at the profit center group level. Profit center group is a property added to the profit center dimension.

All other sections has entries at a GL Account group level. GL Account group is a property added to the GL Account dimension.

How can I get a similar layout as below? Also, the MRR total is considered for calculations further down for calculating total revenue and profit, and others.

Any suggestions?

entry.title: Smart Table fields not become editable when I press the edit button different behavior on versions
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have a question : In SAP BTP I use 2 versions locally of an SAP Smart Table application - In the 1.127.0 version I use the same code as in the 1.96.38 version : 

<mvc:View controllerName="..."  

    xmlns="sap.f"

    xmlns:m="sap.m"

    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"

    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"

    xmlns:smartFilterBar="sap.ui.comp.smartfilterbar"

    xmlns:smartTable="sap.ui.comp.smarttable"

    xmlns:sv="sap.ui.comp.smartvariants"

    xmlns:sf="sap.ui.comp.smartfield"

    xmlns:form="sap.ui.comp.smartform"

    xmlns:app="http://schemas.sap.com/sapui5/extension/sap.ui.core.CustomData/1"

    height="100%">

 

     <DynamicPage id="dynamicPage" fitContent="true">

        <header>

            <DynamicPageHeader id="_IDGenDynamicPageHeader1">

                <smartFilterBar:SmartFilterBar id="smartFilterBar" entitySet="ZEWM_C_MATERIAL" persistencyKey="SmartTableAnalytical_Explored"  enableBasicSearch="true">

                    <smartFilterBar:layoutData>

                        <m:FlexItemData id="_IDGenFlexItemData1" shrinkFactor="0"/>

                    </smartFilterBar:layoutData>

                </smartFilterBar:SmartFilterBar>

            </DynamicPageHeader>

        </header>

        <content>

            <smartTable:SmartTable id="LineItemsSmartTable" entitySet="ZEWM_C_MATERIAL" smartFilterId="smartFilterBar" tableType="ResponsiveTable"  

                enableExport="true" beforeExport="onBeforeExport" useVariantManagement="true" useTablePersonalisation="true" header="{i18n>smartTableHeader}"  

                showRowCount="true" persistencyKey="SmartTableAnalytical_Explored" enableAutoBinding="true"  class="sapUiResponsiveContentPadding"  

                enableAutoColumnWidth="true" editTogglable="true" showDetailsButton="true" detailsButtonSetting="Medium,Low" demandPopin="true"  

                app:useSmartField = "true" editToggled="onEditToggled" placeToolbarInTable="true">  

                    <smartTable:customToolbar>

                        <m:Toolbar id="_IDGenToolbar" >

                            <m:ToolbarSpacer id="_IDGenToolbarSpacer1" ></m:ToolbarSpacer>

                            <m:Button icon="sap-icon://create" enabled = "false" id="_IDGenButton" press="onCreate" text="{i18n>Create}"></m:Button>

                            <m:Button icon="sap-icon://request" enabled = "false" id="_MassChange" press="onMassChange" text="{i18n>MassChange}"></m:Button>

                        </m:Toolbar>

                    </smartTable:customToolbar>

                    <smartTable:layoutData>

                        <m:FlexItemData id="_IDGenFlexItemData2" growFactor="1" baseSize="0%"/>

                    </smartTable:layoutData>  

                    <m:Table id="_IDGenTable" growing="true" growingThreshold="20" growingScrollToLoad="true" mode="MultiSelect"  sticky="ColumnHeaders,HeaderToolbar" />

                </smartTable:SmartTable>

        </content>

    </DynamicPage>  

</mvc:View>

The difference is that on the 1.127.0 version when I press the Edit/toggle button the fields are becoming editable and can add values on them, and in the 1.96.38 version the fields are not becoming editable when I press the button and the ones that have no value are showing just a field with a line. I know that the  app:useSmartField = "true" may be not compatible, but do you know any workaround to solve this issue please ?

entry.title: Introducing the Gantt Chart Custom Widget for SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Intoduction

While SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) provides powerful tools for visualizing and analyzing data, one notable visualization currently missing from its standard offering is the Gantt Chart. Gantt charts are widely used for visualizing timelines, dependencies, and resource allocation, making them indispensable for effective project management and scheduling.

To bridge this gap, I've developed a custom Gantt Chart widget specifically designed for SAC users. This widget seamlessly integrates into your SAC environment.

SAP users across various business functions can leverage this custom widget to visualize numerous use cases, including:

  • Project Timelines
  • Maintenance Scheduling
  • Production Planning
  • Employee Resource Allocation
  • Release Management

In this blog, you'll learn step-by-step how to integrate and configure this custom Gantt Chart widget in your SAC environment to effectively visualize and manage your scheduling data.

 

Installing the Gantt Chart Custom Widget

To integrate the custom Gantt Chart widget into your SAP Analytics Cloud environment, please follow these detailed steps:

  1. Download Required Files: Download UI5GanttChart.json and UI5GanttChart.zip files from the GitHub repository.

  2. Upload JSON Definition File:

    • Log in to your SAP Analytics Cloud.
    • Navigate to Stories and select the Custom Widgets tab.
    • Click Create and upload the UI5GanttChart.json file you downloaded earlier.

  3. Upload Resource Files:

    • After uploading the JSON file, click the Select File button that appears.
    • Select and upload the UI5GanttChart.zip archive file containing the widget's resource files.

For additional information, refer to the official SAP Analytics Cloud documentation.

 

Technical Implementation Overview

The custom Gantt Chart widget is built using the standard UI5 GanttChartWithTable control. Some properties of the underlying UI5 control are exposed through the widget's Builder and Styling panels, allowing users to customize and adapt the visualization according to their needs. However, the UI5 GanttChartWithTable control offers numerous additional features, many of which are not yet implemented in this custom widget. This provides significant opportunities for future improvements and feature enhancements. A detailed discussion of the technical implementation will be covered in a separate blog post.

 

Data Binding for the Custom Widget

The Gantt Chart custom widget does not utilize standard SAC data binding capabilities like those available for table or chart widgets. Instead, it provides an API method named setDataSet that accepts one argument of type Array of ResultSet. You can easily obtain this data array by retrieving it from a standard SAC table widget. Specifically, call the getDataSource().getResultSet() method on the table widget, then pass the result directly to the custom widget using the following code:

var tasksResultSet = Table_Tasks.getDataSource().getResultSet();
GanttChart_1.setDataSet(tasksResultSet);

This approach requires you to use a standard table to retrieve the necessary data, even if this table is hidden from view. It's convenient to implement the provided code snippet within the onResultChanged event handler of the table, ensuring that each time the table data changes (e.g., applying a new filter), the Gantt Chart widget updates automatically.

Because of this approach, data will not be visualized in the Gantt Chart during design mode (designtime). The custom widget also needs to understand how to extract information from the ResultSet. Thus, required fields need to be mapped to corresponding elements in the ResultSet through the "Dataset Parsing Settings" section in the widget's Builder Panel.

To inspect your ResultSet structure, you can use the following script to log it to the console:

console.log(tasksResultSet);

Here is an example of what your ResultSet might look like:

[
    {
        "@MeasureDimension": {
            "id": "DUMMY",
            "description": "DUMMY",
            "rawValue": "1",
            "formattedValue": "1"
        },
        "ID": {
            "id": "1",
            "description": "1",
            "properties": {}
        },
        "Name": {
            "id": "Phase 1",
            "description": "Phase 1",
            "properties": {}
        },
        "Description": {
            "id": "Initial phase of the project",
            "description": "Initial phase of the project",
            "properties": {}
        },
        "Start_Datetime": {
            "id": "2025-01-01 08:00:00.0000000",
            "description": "Jan 1, 2025 8:00:00",
            "properties": {}
        },
        "End_Datetime": {
            "id": "2025-03-31 18:00:00.0000000",
            "description": "Mar 31, 2025 18:00:00",
            "properties": {}
        },
        "Parent_ID": {
            "id": "",
            "description": "",
            "properties": {}
        },
        "Color": {
            "id": "#3357FF",
            "description": "#3357FF",
            "properties": {}
        }
    },
    {
        "@MeasureDimension": {
            "id": "DUMMY",
            "description": "DUMMY",
            "rawValue": "1",
            "formattedValue": "1"
        },
        "ID": {
            "id": "5",
            "description": "5",
            "properties": {}
        },
        "Name": {
            "id": "Task 1.1",
            "description": "Task 1.1",
            "properties": {}
        },
        "Description": {
            "id": "Research and planning",
            "description": "Research and planning",
            "properties": {}
        },
        "Start_Datetime": {
            "id": "2025-01-05 09:00:00.0000000",
            "description": "Jan 5, 2025 9:00:00",
            "properties": {}
        },
        "End_Datetime": {
            "id": "2025-01-25 17:00:00.0000000",
            "description": "Jan 25, 2025 17:00:00",
            "properties": {}
        },
        "Parent_ID": {
            "id": "1",
            "description": "1",
            "properties": {}
        },
        "Color": {
            "id": "#3357FF",
            "description": "#3357FF",
            "properties": {}
        }
    },
...
]

And the corresponding settings in the Builder panel:

Values in the ResultSet can be addressed in the following ways:

  • Name.id – the id of the corresponding dimension will be used
  • Name.description – the description of the corresponding dimension will be used
  • Name – equivalent to Name.id

Below is an overview of each field required for configuring the Gantt Chart custom widget datset parsing:

  • Event ID: Unique identifier for each bar on the Gantt Chart.
  • Event Name: Text displayed directly on the bar of the Gantt Chart.
  • Event Description (optional): Text displayed as a tooltip when hovering over a bar.
  • Start Time, End Time: Define the start and end times corresponding to the Gantt Chart bar.
  • Parent ID (optional): Enables hierarchical organization of bars into a two-level structure. This field should reference the Event ID of the parent bar.
  • Color of Event Bar (optional): Hexadecimal color code used to define the color of the corresponding bar on the Gantt Chart.

 

Additional Settings

The Gantt Chart custom widget provides additional configuration options to fine-tune its appearance and behavior. These settings are available in the widget's Builder panel. Styling-related settings will be covered in a separate section.

 

Time Zone Settings

  • Dataset Timezone Offset from UTC (UTC ± X): If the value is not zero, the Start Time and End Time will be converted from the specified offset to UTC. This setting can also be used to visually shift the Gantt bars by a defined number of hours.

 

Horizon Settings

Total Horizon defines the complete time frame that is visible in the Gantt Chart. It can either be fixed or dynamic:

  • If Dynamic Total Horizon is disabled, the horizon boundaries are defined by the values set in Start Time and End Time properties.
  • If Dynamic Total Horizon is enabled, the horizon is calculated based on the current date and time, using the specified number of minutes to look back and forward (Look Back and Look Forward properties).

 

Visual Horizon defines the portion of the Total Horizon that is visible to the initially visible to the user.

  • If Dynamic Visual Horizon is enabled, its boundaries are calculated automatically to ensure all bars from the dataset are included and visible in the chart area by default.
  • Otherwise, the visual horizon is equal to the total horizon.

 

Display Mode

  • Compact Representation: When enabled, all bars with the same name will be displayed on a single row, while still maintaining unique IDs. This is especially useful for visualizing recurring events or grouped tasks. If disabled, each bar is shown on its own row even if multiple bars share the same name.

Compact Representation

 

Table Settings

  • Table Columns: This property defines the columns that appear in the table section (left pane) of the Gantt Chart. It expects a JSON array of objects, each specifying a column with two required properties:
    • field: Refers to a dimension in the dataset in the same way as parsing settings (either id or description).
    • label: The display name shown in the table header.

Example:

[
  {
    "field": "Name",
    "label": "Tasks"
  },
  {
    "field": "Description",
    "label": "Description"
  },
  {
    "field": "Start_Datetime.description",
    "label": "Start"
  },
  {
    "field": "End_Datetime.description",
    "label": "End"
  }
]

 

Gantt Chart Styling

The Gantt Chart custom widget offers several visual customization options located in the widget's Styling panel. These settings allow to control the appearance of the chart bars and labels for improved readability and alignment with visual design standards.

 

Apply Same Color for All Bars

  • This setting enables users to define a uniform color for all bars in the chart.
  • It accepts a hex color code (e.g., #3498DB).
  • When applied, the color defined here overrides the color values provided in the dataset.

 

Automatic Text Color

  • A checkbox that, when enabled, automatically selects either white or black text based on the bar color to ensure readability.
  • This option is useful when bar colors vary and text contrast must be preserved.

 

Fixed Text Color

  • This field is only active when Automatic Text Color is disabled.
  • Users can manually define a hex color code to be used for text labels across all bars.

Bars Opacity

  • Defines the transparency level of the bars. Default value is 0.8.
  • Accepts a numeric value from 0 (completely transparent) to 1 (fully opaque).

 

Conclusion

The Gantt Chart custom widget for SAP Analytics Cloud fills a critical visualization gap by enabling intuitive and flexible timeline representation directly within SAC stories and applications. With its support for hierarchical structures, dynamic time horizons, and extensive customization options, the widget seamlessly integrates into diverse planning and reporting scenarios.

By following the setup and configuration steps outlined in this post, you can easily incorporate the widget into your dashboards.

Further enhancements and deep-dives into the technical implementation will be covered in upcoming posts. Feedback and contributions are welcome — feel free to comment and help shape the future of this custom visualization.

entry.title: Re: Business Volume calculation in Condition Contract Man...
entry.content:
Hi Ramesh,

There is only single invoice. after selecting single record, report showing 2 line items for the same invoice.

Thank you

Rahul

entry.title: Re: EWM: Planned replenishment with layout-orientated war...
entry.content:
Hello @Ajit_Routray , this would lead to the same problem. Because Hansdada mentioned "However, if I select the line and want to create the warehouse task, none is created because the system correctly recognises that the MAIN-HU (pallet) may not be stored in the small parts warehouse (container warehouse):"

If you propose source HU as destination HU system would block the pallet because its not allowed in small parts area.

entry.title: Re: Custom Tasks in Onboarding and Offboarding
entry.content: in this kba only its mention NDA can be added - how to do that as we cant add attachment field , pls if anyone has the idea how to add documents under custom task

entry.title: Is it possible to use Web Service as a source for Web Intelligence document?
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

We have some specific logic that we want to apply in ABAP so we want to use AMDP wrapped in Web Service as source for Web Intelligence document. Is this possible? We only found the KBA below that uses an existing report to create an Odata URL that may be used as source in Web Intelligence. 

3400033 - How to generate an OData URL for a report element in Web Intelligence

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003400033

We have a web service that is available in /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE and can be accessed through browser. But when we use this Web service URL in defining the Web Intelligence, we get error below. Not able to find any information for this error anywhere.Error IES 10532

We are at patch 11. Any clues please?

entry.title: IW40 gives whitelist error
entry.content:
I am trying to view the sub-orders for the order created via IW40 but when executed, I am getting an error message that "the value is not in the whitelist".

Its the same case when i try to check the sub-orders via IW33 -> Extras -> Sub-Orders -> Overview.

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in Advance,

Ajay

entry.title: Re: Cost posting for professional services project
entry.content:
Hi @LeventePosza 

Thank you for sharing your question. If you take a pure look on the cost postings based on the time recording this is the standard system behavior and the standard g/l account. However, usually there is also a posting based on the event based revenue recognition, which is not available in your example, if this is intended this is fine, if not most probably something is missing.

Best regards,

David

entry.title: Custom Domain Question in SAP Cloud Identity Services
entry.content: If we create custom domain for IAS tenant, do we have to reconfigure SSO's of Applications and Corporate Identity Providers that are already configured in the tenant to use the custom domain URL's? Can the existing configurations continue to work with default *.accounts.ondemand.com url?

entry.title: Re: CU50 in internal tables
entry.content: What happens if you run SHDB with the option "continue after commit" or "simulate no batch input"?

entry.title: Story reporting - Last Trans Seq
entry.content:
Hi all,

I hope you can help me with an issue I'm encountering in a transfer report based on event reasons from the job information table.

I have some duplications in my story table due to the double use of an event reason. In the canvas report, I could use the field 'Last Trans Seq.' However, this field isn't available in the story report. How can I ensure that I have the last sequence in the report to avoid duplication in story reporting?

Example of the double event use

Thanks

Mirjam

entry.title: Re: Popup when running MRP with MD01n "no planning file entry"
entry.content: even though we maintain proper parameter still i am same error? is that related to Lot size?

entry.title: Re: How to manage Workflows for Sales Price in SAP S/4HANA ?
entry.content:
Thanks @MarceGiovanetti for a very useful post.

I am setting up Sales price approval workflow on SAP S/$ HANA 2023. Based on your findings on your above post I have a question.

  • If a condition record is created or changed by transaction VK11/VK12 the condition record will be set up as status "blocked". If this occurs, you can request for approval by the "Manage Prices Sales app" next.

Is the above behavior standard behavior, since I do not see this in our development or quality system. I see a field called "system status" and "processing status" on VK11/VK12 but this are both blank unless I assign the processing status as "Blocked" during VK11 manually. I have aligned the "processing status" to match the "System status" via configuration in SPRO. I am also aboe to assign this processing status in "Create condition" app on FIORI launch pad.

Trust you would be able to review this question and provide me a way to set the processing and system status as blocked by default.

Thanks,

Kartik Shah

entry.title: Exporting list from "Test Your Processes"
entry.content:
In "Test Your Processes" app, is it possible to download/export the list of processes steps with actions?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Exporting list from "Test Your Processes"
entry.content:
This feature is not currently available as functionality at the tool.

Users can download the logs along with executed screenshots as pdf but exporting actions from process step to excel is not yet possible.

entry.title: Re: Issue on Label Printing: the character 'O' (letter o) looks like a '0' (zero)
entry.content: There's a printer command reference/programming guide for IPL (and any printer language), you can find how to choose the font. You may send these printer commands in SAPscript and Smart Form.

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP Integration Suite Deployment
entry.content:
Hi @roddsrod ,

This is great! I don't suppose this will create the capabilities of Integration suite like cloud integration, api management, open connector, etc. right?

I had created a terraform project for automation of the same thing and the only thing which is missing and is done manually is activation of those capabilities inside integration suite as it is currently a limitation for btp provider to do the same. But then yes I assume even terraform uses powershell scripts of btp and cf cli in the background so the limitation remains the same!

 

Regards,

Raihan

entry.title: Unable to create Service Key for AI Core Instance
entry.content:
I am trying to create Service Key for the AI Core instance. But I am getting this error:
"Couldn't create service key 'DevAI_Key'. Please view details for more information.
You are not authorized to perform the requested action."

I am unable to figure out which authorization is missing. I have 28 Role Collections assigned to my name and there is nothing else to assign. So, what am I missing here?

Please help.

entry.title: Re: Using Integration Suite with the power of AI
entry.content: @1nbuc  this project is an excelent idea. I'm looking forward to see more achivements with it in further blog articles.

entry.title: Re: eInvoice details on Invoice form
entry.content: Dear Dequan, Thanks for the response & sorry for the late reply. We are following the standard steps mentioned above. The challenge is with step 3 - Output Determination. The output gets created immediately after the billing creation. We want the output getting created only after the eDocument status (eInvoice and e-Way Bill) successfully updated. This will automatically ensure eInvoice & e-Way Bill printed in the Billing output. Hoping for the solution.

entry.title: Re: Migrating to Crystal 64-bit questions
entry.content:
Hi Anders,

Wow those are really old, CR added those Date functions in CR 7 I believe. You could rewrite them using .NET sample UFL pasted the link to.

For one you can use:

CDate

Overloads

  • CDate (number)

  • CDate (string)

  • CDate (dateTime)

  • CDate (YYYY, MM, DD)

It will however force you to edit each report.

entry.title: BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE
entry.content: This is new to me. I'm calling this RFC via vb.net for a 'goods issue to a reservation', it returns a material doc and year but the transaction commit does not seem to work. The 'create' returns a doc and year but 'commit' returns blank. It does not get posted. Is this because each call is actually a different LUW and it needs to be the same luw?

entry.title: Re: crystal report issue
entry.content:
What version of CR are you using? What MS Client are you using? CR is simply passing the error to you from the Server/Client. I suggest contacting Microsoft for help.

CR fully supports DB security,  nothing in CR to get past this error.

entry.title: Re: Blog it Forward - Raquel Cunha - version 2025
entry.content:
@edusatobr Call me and I’ll arrange a 3-way call so we can introduce ourselves. We are here to help with anything you need — you're not alone, dear. We’re all part of the SAP family, and we support each other. Feel free to send me your mobile number. +52 558 791 1944

@Raquel_Pereira_da_Cunha Im so so so happy to see you here again! 

#CobraKaiNeverDies #Better2gether

entry.title: Re: Migrating to Crystal 64-bit questions
entry.content: Sorry Don of I was unclear. The issue is not date functions per se but rather the UFL we wrote that takes a Finnish SSN and returns the age as a number, the birthdate as a date and this years birthday as a date. So the question is more: How do I receive and unpack a date in an UFL and how do I return a date? The functions I mention takes a year,month,day and returns a CR Date and vice versa

entry.title: Re: CR reports cannot connect to SQL Server database
entry.content:
Ah, so you are the developer of FT.... Yes I noticed that also, there no option to download a Trial Version of 2025, not sure if they just haven't got around to adding it yet or not... I'll ping the guys in Product and ask them if and when or if they were aware....

Let me explain about the Embedded Report Designer in Visual Studio.

Years ago CR was integrated into Visual Studio 5 until VS 2010, at which time CR for .NET was a separate download and installer.

In those early versions the Embedded Report designer, CRAXDDRT.dll, came with VS/CR. It is known as CR Basic. You'll notice there are area's in various UI's that don't have all of then options available.

So the Embedded version uses the same DB Dll's as CR Designer uses, so using CR 2016/2025 likely won't work either now.

One thing to be aware of, CR uses memory to load the Database info into memory to show the DB structures etc. IF you go over that limit nothing shows up, this may explain why you don't see anything now... Your SQL Server DB structure is getting large...

On the connection property select Options, you can add filtering, try unchecking everything except Tables, try each one, if that doesn't show anything then try adding filtering to see if that helps.

For more info on what CR is doing you can enable CRLogger, it's CR's DB logging component:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/1603398

hope that helps...

Don

entry.title: Re: Seperate PR Order Reservation Wise
entry.content: correct this solve the problem

entry.title: Re: BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEDATA - TAXCLASSIFICATION
entry.content:
Hi together,

the LAND1 must not be taken from T001W, but via TVKO-VKORG => BUKRS => T001-LAND1.

Regards!

entry.title: Redesigned candidate exp config

entry.title: Re: Migrating to Crystal 64-bit questions
entry.content: Hi Anders, ah so in C# I use the Windows DateTime() function: public struct DateTime I think you should be able to convert the C++ DateTime functions to C# and then format the outout according to CDate formating... I hope that answers your question?

entry.title: Re: New Product Compliance Integration EWM
entry.content:
Hello

Please check (as an example) all the very good (= fantasti) Blogs of Christian

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-private-edition-2023-fps02-release-part-1/ba-p/13875865

And check Online Help of SAP Cloud. E.g. https://help.sap.com/whats-new/5fc51e30e2744f168642e26e0c1d9be1?Product_Line=SAP+S/4HANA&Version=2023+FPS02&locale=en-US or similar links

I can not help you further. I am as well on "learning curve" of the new solution and wait for On Prem version 2025

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Data Doesn’t Drive the Business - Trust Does. SAP Business Data Cloud Delivers.
entry.content: Nice blog Anthony 👍

entry.title: SAPUI5 : Extra PATCH call triggered on changing value of annotation based drop down.
entry.content:
We have observed a issue in Fiori Elements based List Report CAPM application for newer SAPUI5 versions > 1.120.0

We are currently on SAPUI5 version 1.134.0. We have defined annotation based drop down on object page as below and it renders fine with required values on UI.

Now every time we change value of this drop down, we observe an extra PATCH call triggered immediately on entity, trying to update the entity with this changed value of property referenced by dropdown, in this case firstName.

This causes wrong updating of entity value in database and if entity is defined @readonly, error is generated saying we are trying to update read-only entity.

Please guide on how to avoid this extra PATCH call or any workaround.

Please find below repo replicating the issue.

https://github.com/MudassirHasan1/ui5service

Regards.

entry.title: Eclipse ADT Version 2025-03 (4.35.0) crashes *continuously* in Mac (aarch64)
entry.content:
I've recently updated Eclipse (with the prospect of, you know, testing that ABAP LLM buzz) and since then my life has become a nightmare.

I work with a MacBook M2 Max in Sequoia 15.4 and now I'm finding extremely difficult to have some continuity when coding.

So this is my life now, I see this window on the order of a couple dozen a day:

My question is: why? but, also, is it only me? Just in case, I've warned the rest of my team to keep themselves a hundred miles away from the new version.

Besides the regular installation of Eclipse + ADT package I only have installed the plugins for AbapCleaner and Github's Copilot (in the case of this last one I installed it after upgrading and already suffering this behavior so it doesn't seem to be guilty of this crime).

Dose any other developer, with more or less my same setup, suffer this punishment? Any ideas before I give up and uninstall-reinstall the older working version of Eclipse+ADT I can find?

entry.title: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes
entry.content:
Hi, we've just updated to runtime version 13_0_37 and Crystal decisions 13.0.4000.0   (64 bit)

Our application is configured to use 5 IIS Worker Processes, but since the upgrade we have a problem with the report viewer "losing" its parameter. We believe this is when the client connection is processed by another Worker Process after the report is loaded. So you run a report, it prompts for the parameter and it shows correctly, however then when attempting to change the View %, it intermittently re-prompts for the parameter. Or when exporting, intermittently nothing happens after you click export.

We have ReuseParameterValuesOnRefresh="true" on the viewer - it was working ok before we upgraded the Crystal version used. Session is shared using StateServer service.

Setting maximum worker processes to 1 works around the issue but I'd like to be able to have multiple worker processes.

Is this a known issue or anything I can try? There are no errors reported in the browser dev tools. I read somewhere that Crystal expects its memory in a contiguous block, I guess this is the issue with different processes serving the requests, but not sure why its only become an issue in this version. Maybe because its 64 bit?

entry.title: Re: Inquiry on Removing Watermark: "Implementation Projec...
entry.content:
Hi Amol,

We successfully removed the watermark from several documents in SAP By Design "without" bringing our system to Production status ("Live"). If you have developers on staff who are comfortable editing XML files, you can go to "Form Template Maintenance" in the "Applications and User Management" Work View and download the form that you wish to remove "Test Copy" watermark. We did it for Invoices, Sales Orders, and Purchase Orders. 

Any commercial or free XML Editor will enable your developers to access the "Test Copy" text in the form and change it to NULL (" "). Then upload the modified ADOBE XML file back in to SAP By Design via the "Upload" button in "Form Template Maintenance" for the form that was modified.

As I mentioned, our SAP By Design has not gone through all the steps to Go-Live, we're still in Test Mode because we want add additional functionality before formally declaring a "Go Live" status which removes the watermark as mentioned by SAP.

There is no impact on system behavior or functionality. Good luck!

entry.title: SAP Service and Asset Manager Gis Enhancement with Feature layer
entry.content:
Hi experts!

 

I need some help to understand if the development for my client requirement is possible to do in SSAM. i'm having a lot of doubts of the integration of SSAM and GIS.

The client already have the GIS and Feature layers with all the equipment with numbers and icons created. We are not going to create in SAP all this equipment in the lowest level as a business decision, but they want to create a notification for the GIS Equipment number for example inputing in the Description of Notification. 

Is it possible to enhance this functionality in SSAM map, to select the GIS equipment number in Feature layer, press a button after to open a notification with the Description filled automatically with GIS equipment number and create a notification?

 

Best Regards,

 

Rafael Eij Umeda

 

SAP Service and Asset Manager 

SAP Mobile Services 

SAP BTP SDK for Android

entry.title: Clarification on CTS Dependencies
entry.content:
I would like to gain a clear understanding of how CTS (Change and Transport System) dependencies are established.

In what cases do CTS dependencies occur?  

-> As one case example, we recently made modifications to two different GL accounts (let’s refer to them as GL Account 1 and GL Account 2).  

1.1) The changes made to both GL accounts were identical (only internal details of the GL account were modified).  

1.2) Each modification was included in separate CTS transports — GL Account 1 was included in Transport 1, and GL Account 2 in Transport 2.  

1.3) We observed that Transport 1 has a lock token and cannot be ignored, whereas Transport 2 has no lock token and can be released independently.

Although these changes were processed in separate CTS requests and have no shared components (e.g., they are not assigned to the same financial statement version or any common structure), they still appear to be treated as dependent.

 

We would like to understand: Why are these two CTS transports not treated independently? What triggers such dependencies, and how are they technically formed?

To summarize: We would like detailed insight into the scenarios that may cause dependencies between CTS transports, especially in the context of GL account changes.

Since we believe each CTS request should be managed independently, we are also inquiring whether it is possible to remove or avoid such dependencies, to ensure isolated transport of individual changes.

Currently, due to these unexpected CTS dependencies, even test CTS requests are being transported together.

This is having a significant impact on our internal audit process on the customer side.

We appreciate your guidance and expertise on this matter.

Best regards,

Min Sun 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Clarification on CTS Dependencies
entry.content:
Kindly refer the below help doc to check for how dependency works within object 

Transport Dependencies | SAP Help Portal > Overtaking > Object Dependencies

entry.title: Re: Registros de planos de inspeção sumiram
entry.content: Querido Daniel, muito obrigado pela ajuda.

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager GIS
entry.content:
Hi @james_murphy01 !

After the sincronization of input of globalID in the mapping table, the geometry and icons of objects in GIS will reflect as the same geometry and icon in SSAM Map?

For example, if a equipment in GIS is a circle, then after sincronization, in SSAM the equipment will be a circle too?

 

Best Regards,

 

Rafael Eij Umeda

entry.title: Re: Planned orders not transferred S4 from APO in embeded...
entry.content:
Hello,

Orders generated in ePPDS will not be transferred to standalone APO system. Please refer information in SAP note 3073717 where this restriction is mentioned.

3073717 - General Restrictions and Implementation Recommendations for Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling for SAP S/4HANA 2021

   “Integration of orders generated out of "Standalone SCM-APO" to PP/DS for SAP S/4HANA or vice versa is not supported.”

According to Note - 2376061, Certain versions of "Standalone APO" running side by side with SAP S/4 HANA are supported.

Thanks,

Tejas Vaidya

entry.title: Function Product from Excel - SAP ANALYTICS CLOUD
entry.content:
Is there a function in Excel that allows me to calculate the product of values ​​
=Product(a1;a2;a3).
Is there a similar function in SAC?
I need to multiply values ​​of the same measure by filtering by a group. But by default SAC adds the values ​​and I can't multiply them. Instead of adding when aggregating, I should multiply them.
Thanks.
Sabrina.

entry.title: Re: New Pipeline Concept features: integrated runtimes and supporting landscape stages
entry.content:
@alex_bundschuh thank you very much for your valued input!

Error in the first place was the PIP07 scenario specific outbound processing, where a content modifier step failed due to an XPath error (because no payload available).

  • Pipeline Generic Step01 - Inbound Processing for XI (ok)
  • Pipeline Generic Step02 - Integrated Messaging Runtime Async (ok)
  • PIP07 iFlow copied from standard (failed)

There is no error visible in Step01. 

Indeed XI inbound was on version 1.0.3. I have updated now to 1.0.4.

I will closely monitor the processing and raise an incident as you suggested if the error persists.

Thanks,

Ronald

entry.title: Price Determination Structure view is not available in Material Price Analysis
entry.content:
Price Determination Structure view is not available in Material Price Analysis App(CKM3N) normally the Price Determination Structure view is available with price history view in CKM3N app for Material Price Analysis. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Price Determination Structure view is not available i...
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


The Price Determination structure is only displayed if you are using Actual Costing, if not, then only Price History view is shown. Therefore, kindly check whether scope item 33Q (Actual Costing) is active and being used.

Material Price Analysis


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Please any custom ABAP code to check DDIC object nami...
entry.content:
You may install the ABAP code of the Code Inspector test, via abapGit, at sandraros/ZCIDDONC: Code Inspector Test to check DDIC Object naming.

Issues can be reported here: Issues.

@patrick_winkler Thanks for your feedback.

entry.title: Re: ST12 vs sqltrace response time.
entry.content:
Hi,

ST12 (like SAT) measures in the ABAP VM while ST05 measures on database interface level (closer to the DB) and HANA traces measure directly on the DB.

So ST12 / SAT measurements contain more executed code in the stack than ST05 traces and HANA traces even less executed code and no network communication if measured directly on the DB server.

Probably not helpful anymore after 1 year... 😉

Kind regards,

Hermann

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
@ShindeSonal it is great to meet you in the community. I live in the US outside of Philadelphia and my role is in the SAP Community team. Be sure to join groups to get more engaged. Best of luck.

Location Groups | SAP Community

Meet the SAP Community Leaders and read their blogs too! SAP Community Leaders Finder | SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to configure or control the PO date in...
entry.content:
Hi Ankit, 

A solution you might want to consider is making the delivery date invisible when your Purchasers (SAP Users) create Purchase Orders and Requests. This way, Purchase Orders will always default to the date on which they are created. 

You can restrict the visibility of date fields in Purchase Orders and Request via Adaptation Mode, if you have Administrative Rights in your SAP Profile. Once in Adaptation Mode, you select or deselect which columns are visible to SAP Users. <SAVE> the changes and <PUBLISH> the screens that you modified so that they Purchase Date fields are invisible to SAP Users.

The SAP Users will create Purchase Orders as usual and the PO date will be invisible to them but it will default to the current date which will be visible to SAP Users in the Purchase Order Overview screen but can't be changed.

entry.title: Re: ODATA GET Issue with Postman

entry.title: Inconsistent data between table KBLP and COOI and FMIOI
entry.content:
Please find attached document having screen shots of below mentioned issue we have in our production PS1, Integration QST and QS1 UAT  system. Attached screen shots is from our QST system and it is where first we need a fix before fix in Production

Issue:

We have found some inconsistency between EARMARKED FUNDS (Funds Commitment) table KBLP and  FM commitment documents FMIOI and CO commitment line item table COOI. 

REFX contract 1271/4521776 assigned to funds commitment 7000033525 and you can see in attached document point 4 where REFX contract look ok. The issue is when we see funds commitment 7000033525 via FMZ3 it shows two line item which is also validated via REFX contract as well as in table KBLP. 

However when we run KSB2 commitment item report for cost centers it shows 5 line items in which item item 1 is ok, item 2 has incorrect amount and item 3, 4 and 5 is showing which not exist in FMZ3 and KBLP. 

KSB2 retrieved commitments amount from table COOI which is commitment details table and this table also contain 5 line items with 3 , 4 and 5 not exist in FMZ3

Also FM commitment document table FMIOI is showing 5 items where as item 1 and 2 are correct and 3, 4 and 5 is in this table however they are not in FMZ3 or in KBLP

Following Requests from SAP:

  1. How can we delete or removed incorrect entries from COOI and FMIOI to make sure our free balance reports , KSB2 and all reports showing only two items exactly the way we seeing in tale KBLP and via FMZ3
  2. Also if SAP can highlight what would be the potential causes which have this inconsistency. 

 

As this is just example of one contract and funds commitments however we have issue in multiple contracts and funds commitment so we highly appreciate if SAP can pinpoint some program, OSS note or any fix which delete those inconsistent document for our commitment reports.

hello - if somebody could help with this topic as below

- the problem with the licence immidiately occurred and I tried to logon to SAP* to fix this problem  - unfortunatelly I locked the SAP GUI with the message "Password logon no longer possible - to many failed attempts" - I've tried to reinstall SAP logon several times, clean the registry and the only attempt will stay like to reinstall Docker installation because , I suppose...because the failed attempts are stored in the application server...

the only Login ID that is consider is IDADMIN on 000 Client but... instead "Password logon no longer possible - to many failed attempts" messsage I got "Logon not possible  - error in license check" -  but can't to get it ... 

regards

entry.title: Re: Migration cockpit - different approach shown for same...

entry.title: Re: UI5 apps added to SAP Build Workzone not working
entry.content: sap.cloud config is missing in the manifest.json as in this example below https://github.com/lemaiwo/bookshopdemo/blob/0cd9e6fbbbe0f0333d6f3470cd35ea3eb4900aa2/app/admin-books/webapp/manifest.json#L144

entry.title: Re: Unable to create Service Key for AI Core Instance
entry.content:
The error was misleading as it says ".. not authorized..". So, I was looking at Roles and Role Collections.

Found the solution: The user trying to create the Service Key must be a member of that Development Space with "Space Developer" Space Role assigned.

entry.title: Grid Interconnection - SAP Innovation Discussion
entry.content:
How does your utility manage the intake, processing, and support of customer applications for new loads and the integration of generation energy sources across residential, commercial, and industrial sectors?

Have you implemented any tailored solutions, either within SAP or on other platforms, to facilitate this?

A group of Utility SAP Customers, Partners and SAP thought leaders are working on addressing the business process of Grid Interconnection for load, generation and energy transfers.  The working group has researched this important area to study the current approaches by customers and what is offered by SAP to build a perspective on what could be done to support the community.  This case study and capabilities review was shared with other utilities at the SAP International Energy & Utilities Conference in Rotterdam, April 9th - 10th 2025.  It's planned to continue this outreach through other channels and events in the coming weeks to begin a wider conversation.

At the Energy & Utilities event the following slides were shared with an aim to collect together Utilities across the global with similar requirements and needs in the next few years around customer requests for new load (new service / new business) and generation interconnections.

First the Market forces and dynamic change over the last 10 years is outlined for the California market:

Alignment to the SAP Utility DER Platform was started to connect the needs of interconnection to DER requirements:

Specific capabilities are made for each aligned element of the DER Platform with an indication of if that capability is seen as a true new capability or one that could be an SAP S/4HANA Roadmap item. 

Finally an outline of the high-level process for Grid Interconnection is presented.

The call to action is to register your organizations interest in engaging with this working group with the aim to influence SAP's future products and other opportunities through SAP Services, CIS and Partners.  Please drop any comments/replies to this post and/or reach out to Dominic Brennan. (Dominic.Brennan01@sap.com)

entry.title: Re: Employee Master data full load using compound employee API
entry.content: Resolved

entry.title: Re: Grid Interconnection - SAP Innovation Discussion
entry.content: This is a great topic that many utilities have put together custom solutions for. I think it may require people to agree on some standard practices to ground the process - which would be a good thing in this space if you ask me.

entry.title: Blog series on my CPI + Camel learning journey - Part6 - Content enricher EIP
entry.content:
Link back to index: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/blog-series-on-my-cpi-camel-learning-journey/ba-p/14031053

 

For this one I will simply put this eip definition in header (the eip book kinda follows this "pattern language" to define patterns)

Problem: How do we communicate with another system if the message originator does not have all the required data items available?

Solution: Use a specialized transformer, a Content Enricher, to access an external data source in order to augment a message with missing information.

The Content Enricher uses information inside the incoming message (e.g. key fields) to retrieve data from an external source. After the Content Enricher retrieves the required data from the resource, it appends the data to the message. The original information from the incoming message may be carried over into the resulting message or may no longer be needed, depending on the specific needs of the receiving application.

So what?

Well, like in this case, there is a reflection of this abstract EIP into Camel world.

And it's not a big surprise that it is an Enrich eip they have there (with its twin Poll Enrich eip of course).

And if you followed this blog series, we already spotted this PollEnrich guy being used in our local blueprints.

But how is it relevant to our current topic?

Well, there is one essential feature of Enrich eip that makes a lot of sense - Aggregation Strategy

And as Camel docs say: "The aggregation strategy is optional. If not provided then Camel will just use the result exchange as the result."

And that was exactly what was happening in our case: we just replaced the message with the one received from the adapter (ftp in our case)

There is another case where CPI uses enrich btw - in Send step (not a coincidence it is in "External Calls" section I guess).

I currently don't have a sample of  such blueprint, but you'll get something like that (in my case I used it with splitter):

And here is that strategy it uses:

What does that mean? Well, it means, there is a camel standard out-of-the-box aggregation strategy "UseOriginalAggregationStrategy" that is used to just keep the original Exchange.

And btw there is a nice blog I found covering this very topic and we'll refer to it once more later in my blog.

Ok, where I am heading to is: probably with all that knowledge we would expect CPI Content Enricher step to do something similar, right?

So how does CPI Content Enricher work?

In this case it was a correct assumption: we indeed have an enrich step with some custom aggregation strategy.

And this is how it looks like:

And here is our strategy:

And obviously, those parameters come from our Step definition in ui (I will not bother covering Combine strategy we can use, cuz I believe it is rather trivial - it just concats stuff) 

So the key takeaways would be:

  • Content enricher is just an enrich eip with preconfigured Aggregation strategies
  • XMLLookupAggregationStrategy is based on XPath and therefore only works with XML bodies
  • And therefore we are restricted to OData or SOAP adapters to be used in our iflows
  • We also need to do a cleanup after the lookup adds nodes to our original body

Rather disappointing conclusion, right?

I'll explain what I mean.

Imagine, we have a followig scenario:

  1. we receive Event Message (via http or event mesh - does not matter much)
  2. then we need to fetch our actual data from odata V4 service (which obviously does NOT support XML anymore)
  3. and then we need to enrich it with data from yet another odata V4 service

Based on my limited experience, this does not look like some made up scenario in case of S/4 project.

And correct me if I'm wrong, but I guess in this case we'll need to figure out where to put the original body - in exchange property (which I guess it is not so illegal even in java world as it has no limit on size but ugly) OR in datastore (which is some unofficial api and thus even uglier solution) - and then merge in script step with response from second service (obtained via simple RequestReply step).

This does not look either low-code or technically correct way to implement that use-case...

And here we would refer again to that blog I mentioned earlier (please kindly refer to "Semi-Custom" and "Custom" sections) for the pro-code approach where we would just implement our own Aggregation Strategy (or check the stackoverflow question I also mentioned above where we just implement it inline within enrich!!!) - and this would be the right solution, but in CPI case we absolutely cannot do that.

Demo part

What we can (and will do) is we will use Poll Enrich again in our local blueprint to implement that Content Enricher Pattern from the guidelines.

In that case we obviously can use sap's Aggregation Strategy in our pollEnrich:

As for the cleanup part I replaced the message mapping with xslt mapping in my sample (which changes the order of xml tags by putting MainCategoryName as last element of and Item), so in case you have schema with strict order of elements this will not work.

This is what we have instead of the original one

Spoiler
I also demo that json+json case that is not covered by CPI with custom "enricher script" step here.
And not only that - I use JS script for it (please refer to this blog by @Lionel_Hu to get more details about features of JS scripting)

Part1 Actual Content Enricher

00:00 Intro and motivation

01:07 Details of sample iflow from guidelines and differences to ours

02:26 Regarding allowed headers and X-Use-Adapter

03:03 Test remote iflow with endpoint ui test (and local preparation stuff)

05:15 XSD schema with strict order of elements potential issue

06:09 See MPL just because we can (to see different steps passed based on X-Use-Adapter)

06:52 Local blueprint details

08:14 Local blueprint ahc path test (get ProductCategories)

09:36 Actual local blueprint test of Aggregation Strategy (with extra xml nodes revealed)

13:37 Link results as test and run it

Secret part2 with json+json "enricher"

14:32 Problem with odata v4 enrichment

16:29 Simple Iflow example to "enrich" json with json

18:27 Some more details about JS scripts in general and particular one we have in iflow

20:52 Test remote iflow

21:50 Regarding null vs undefined in JSON.stringify

22:49 Test local blueprint

24:08 Link results as test and run it

24:49 Outro

entry.title: Re: PO Return Delivery with Shipment
entry.content: Thank you brow, you are awesome

entry.title: CTMS configuration for CPI
entry.content:
I am trying to create CTMS to transport integration iflows from Dev to QA to Prod, i followed the Transport_management document and after subscribing to it, a day later i am not able to see it in the subscriptions, usual suspect here would be roles, all roles were the same, regardless i removed and added them to no avail.

Same behavior is also observed for Content Agent Service, no fixes for that yet. 

Has anyone done this configuration and would you be able to point me to a single source of truth here. 

Any tips or pointers here would be awesome, i have also opened a SAP ticket.
